text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's just that, well, I was chatting with a friend
yesterday, and we got carried away...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I dropped her off in Tata just before curfew...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But that was yesterday, and this is today. It's all
good in the neighborhood!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, Maruzensky definitely
needs some more sleep.
